channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Middle East crisis live: Netanyahu says Israel acted alone in Iran gasfield strike and denies ‘dragging’ US into war - The Guardian
item.description:
1. Middle East crisis live: Netanyahu says Israel acted alone in Iran gasfield strike and denies ‘dragging’ US into war  The Guardian
  2. Trump’s Complaint About Israeli Strike on Gas Field Exposes Divergent Strategies  The New York Times
  3. Trump news at a glance: president claims ignorance of Israel’s plan to strike Iranian gasfield, exposing rift  The Guardian
  4. Exclusive: Iran attacks wipe out 17% of Qatar’s LNG capacity for up to five years, QatarEnergy CEO says  Reuters
  5. Israel hits Tehran with airstrikes on Persian New Year as war jolts energy markets  AP News

item.description:

item.title: Divers find marble treasure from Athens' Acropolis in Lord Elgin's shipwrecked brig at the bottom of the Aegean Sea - Live Science
item.description:
1. Divers find marble treasure from Athens' Acropolis in Lord Elgin's shipwrecked brig at the bottom of the Aegean Sea  Live Science

  3. Parthenon Sculpture Fragment Found in Elgin’s “Mentor” Wreck  GreekReporter.com
  4. Archaeologists Find First ‘Parthenon Marbles’ Evidence at Lord Elgin’s ‘Mentor’ Wreck  Arkeonews
  5. Lost Parthenon Piece Unearthed From Lord Elgin’s Shipwreck  Artnet News
